Published 2 days ago · saigoncoffee.vn

04 AI MANAGEMENT · TODAY'S READ 2 ITEMS
Daily Pick

Push the croissant combo to your morning walk-ins.

Weekday morning ticket goes up 18% when the combo is the featured tile on your Dine-in landing. Switch it in for two weeks and watch the lift.

Heads up

Repeat customer rate dropped 9% this week.

The likely cause: weekend wait times averaged 22 min, up from 9 min the prior month. Two of your last seven VIPs noted the wait by name.

05 GROW WITH MORE SERVICES 1 SUGGESTION

You don't have Delivery CMS yet.

Restaurants like yours unlock +₫4–7M / month when off-premise orders go live. Diners around District 3 already search your menu daily — they just can't order yet.

RECOMMENDATION

Open a Friday 8 PM seating — you're turning customers away

Friday 19:00–20:00 is your busiest hour and you currently cap at 28 seats. You declined 34 requests in the last 30 days for that window. Adding a second 8 PM seating could capture ~22 covers / week.

Est. +₫9.4M / month

Availability rules

Service windows, slot config, blackouts — these govern what every booking source can offer.

🕐 Service windows

Lunch Mon–Fri · 11:30 – 14:30 ● On
Brunch Sat–Sun · 09:00 – 14:30 ● On
Dinner Daily · 17:30 – 22:30 ● On
Late night Fri–Sat · 22:30 – 00:00 ● On

⏱ Slot configuration

24
📐 Floor capacity32 📊 4-week peak26
24
✓ Comfortably within floor capacity · matches typical demand

🚫 Blackouts & overrides

Holidays, private events, kitchen closures — booking sources will not offer these times.

Tet holiday Feb 5–9, 2027 · all day · closed Blackout
Private event Sat 7 Jun · 19:00–23:00 · full buyout Blackout
Kitchen maintenance Tue 21 May · dinner only · capacity halved Reduced

🪑 Per-table rules

Override default availability for specific tables — VIP holds, fixed parties, partner rooms.

W4 (VIP) Reserve for parties of 6+ only · dinner Hold
B1–B5 (Bar) Walk-in only · not bookable in advance Walk-in
T1, T2 2-tops only · don't combine Standard

Availability · single source of truth for "what's bookable when" · enforced centrally so every booking channel offers the same picture

Settings

Confirmation, deposits, no-shows, integrations, and your reservation quota.

📨 Confirmation & reminder

📱 SMS 💬 Zalo (if linked) ✉️ Email

💰 Deposit & no-show policy

Auto-release tables after 15 min
Mark no-show and free the table if party hasn't arrived.

⚡ Reservation quota & PAYG

Your subscription includes a monthly reservation quota; anything above bills as PAYG per reservation.

Included this month600 reservations
Processed so far503 (84%)
Forecast at month end~692
PAYG rate₫800 per extra reservation
Projected overage~₫74k

84% used · ~10 days left in cycle

🔌 Integrations

Google Reserve (Maps + Search)
Let diners book directly from your Google listing. No commission.
Giaodoan marketplace
Listed and accepting bookings. 7% commission per booking.
Apple Wallet booking passes
Customers can add the booking to Apple Wallet for easy reminders.
Send no-shows to Customer CDP
Builds reputation score · flagged customers may require deposit.

    Delivery zones

    Polygons on the map · per-zone fees · min order · ETA rules.

    D1
    ₫15k · 20min
    D2
    ₫25k · 30min
    D3
    ₫40k · 45min

    Zones

    D1 — innerLe Loi · Nguyen Hue · 0–2km · fee ₫15k · min ₫150k● Active
    D2 — extendedD1 outer + D3 inner · 2–4km · fee ₫25k · min ₫200k● Active
    D3 — farD7 + D4 · 4–7km · fee ₫40k · min ₫300k● Active
    Surcharge zoneRush hour (18:00–20:00) · +₫10k everywhereConditional

    Zones · polygons + fees + min order + ETA · drives what's offerable at the customer's address

    Dispatch rules

    How orders find drivers. Auto-assign + manual override + 3rd-party fallback.

    ⚡ Auto-assignment

    Auto-assign new orders
    Picks the best idle driver by proximity + load.

    🔁 3rd-party fallback

    When no internal driver is available, hand off to a logistics partner.

    Grab Express
    Connected · ₫35k + ₫6k/km
    Ahamove
    Connected · ₫28k + ₫5k/km
    Lalamove
    Not connected · click to add

    🚦 Rush-hour rules

    Rush 18:00–20:00Cap auto-accept at 80% capacity · longer ETA shown to customer● On
    Weekend eveningsPre-emptively pull in 3rd-party logistics● On
    Heavy rainAuto-pause new orders if rainfall > 10mm/hrPaused

    Dispatch · the policy layer · auto-assign + fallback + rush rules · same engine for own drivers and 3rd-party logistics

    Tables & QR · each QR opens a branded landing for that table · grouping by section drives kitchen routing

    Service flow

    What diners can do · how orders route to the kitchen · runner workflow.

    👤 Diner actions

    Order food & drink
    Core action — usually always on.
    Call waiter
    Adds a "🔔 Call" button to the QR landing.
    Request bill
    Tap to alert the host stand.
    Modify items mid-order
    Edit cart before fire-to-kitchen.
    Split the bill
    Diners self-split between guests.
    Tip after dining
    Default tip selector after the bill.
    Show estimated prep time
    "Ready in ~8 min" on the order confirmation.

    🍳 Kitchen routing

    Where each menu category fires.

    Hot kitchenMains · pasta · pizza · grillsAuto
    Cold stationSalads · cold starters · dessertsAuto
    BarDrinks · cocktails · juicesAuto
    CoffeeCoffee · tea · hot drinksAuto

    🏃 Runner workflow

    Auto-notify nearest runner
    Based on which section they last delivered to.
    Audible "ready" chime in kitchen
    Plays once per ticket when the kitchen marks ready.
    Hold cold + hot together (combo plates)
    Don't release cold until hot is ready, within 90s window.

    Service flow · diner actions on the QR landing · kitchen station routing · runner workflow tied to floor sections

    Settings

    Service charge · tipping · session timeout · landing branding.

    💰 Service charge & tipping

    Show tip recipients
    "Tips go to your server" · drives higher tip rates.

    ⏱ Session timeout

    🌐 Language

    🇻🇳 VN🇬🇧 EN🇰🇷 KR+ Add

    🎨 QR landing branding

    Cross-promote: "Book your next visit"
    Adds a Booking CTA on the bill screen.

    Settings · service/tipping policy · session lifetime · QR landing language & branding

    saigoncoffee.vn
    Desktop Tablet Mobile
    Tsui Wah Menu  ·  About  ·  Contact Book a table →

    Hong Kong comfort food. Since '67.

    Cha chaan teng classics · open daily · breakfast through late night

    Our story

    A family-run cha chaan teng serving Hong Kong comfort classics since 1967. Three generations, one recipe book.

    "Best pork chop bun in town. Recipe hasn't changed in 50 years and that's the magic."
    — Linh N.
    "Cozy, quick, and the milk tea is unreal. Our weekly stop."
    — Marcus L.

    Today's menu

    Signature Pork Chop Bun
    翠華招牌豬扒包
    S$10.80
    Silky Milk Tea
    香滑奶茶
    S$4.60
    Kagoshima Pork Noodles
    鹿兒島豬軟骨撈麵
    S$14.80

    Tran Minh Anh · via Zalo

    Started 14 min ago · AI is handling · 6 messages
    Today · 14:08
    Hi! Do you have a table for tonight around 7? Maybe 3 or 4 people.
    Tran · 14:08
    Hi Tran 👋 Yes, we have availability tonight. Would you like 7:00 PM or 7:30 PM? And shall I book it for 3 or 4 guests?
    🤖 AI Concierge · 14:08
    Any chance to sit near the window? It's a date night ✨
    Tran · 14:10
    Of course — I'll request a window seat. We can't always guarantee a specific table but I'll flag it as a date-night booking so the host prioritizes it 🌹
    🤖 AI Concierge · 14:10
    Perfect. 4 people at 7 PM please. My name is Tran.
    Tran · 14:11
    ✨
    AI created booking · Tran · 4 guests · Thu 12 May, 7:00 PM · Window seat (requested) · Tag: date night
    Booked! 🎉 Confirmation: #SGC-2841. We'll have the table ready at 7 PM. Anything else — dietary needs, anniversary, allergies?
    🤖 AI Concierge · 14:11
    All good thanks, see you tonight!
    Tran · 14:12
    😊
    🤖 AI auto-reply ON · When ON, AI responds; when OFF, replies are sent as a staff member.

    📞 +84 90 234 5678 · Zalo

    No-shows0
    Avg spend₫1.2M

    AI summary
    🤖 What happened
    Customer requested table for tonight. AI offered availability, captured window-seat preference and date-night context, then created a confirmed 4-guest booking at 7 PM. No further requests.

    🧪 Try it out

    Ask anything — see exactly what your AI would answer right now.

    💭
    🤖 AI: Our truffle pasta contains cream and parmesan, so it's not dairy-free. If you're avoiding dairy, the mushroom risotto can be made dairy-free on request, and the grilled vegetable plate is naturally dairy-free 🌱.
    Sourced from: Menu (truffle pasta, risotto, vegetable plate), Allergen flags (dairy)
    Do you take walk-ins on Friday night? What's your most popular dish? Can I book for 18 people? Do you have a vegan main?

    ⚠️ Coverage gaps

    Questions customers ask that the AI couldn't fully answer. Add knowledge to close the gap.

    "Do you do birthday cakes / cake-cutting?"
    14 asks · AI escalated to staff
    "Wheelchair access details?"
    8 asks · partial answer from Accessibility
    "Discount for students / senior?"
    6 asks · no source

    Recently asked

    "Do you have parking?"24 times
    "Kids menu available?"17 times
    "Dress code?"12 times
    "Open on Tet holiday?"11 times
    "What's the dish in the hero photo?"10 times
    "Do you take ZaloPay?"9 times
    "Closest metro / Grab pickup?"8 times
    "Halal certified?"7 times
    "Corkage fee for BYO wine?"5 times

    Knowledge · 20 sources · 8 auto-synced · 12 manual · coverage score 87% · "Try it out" preview · gaps panel surfaces what to add next

    Behavior

    How your Concierge speaks and what it's allowed to do.

    🎭 Persona

    🇻🇳 Vietnamese (primary) 🇬🇧 English + Add
    A

    💬 Messages

    ⚠️ Escalation rules

    When any of these conditions match, the AI stops and routes to a human.

    When Customer asks about private events or groups of 15+ → Route to Events team ✕
    When Customer mentions complaint, refund, or angry → Route to Manager on duty ✕
    When AI is uncertain for 2+ messages → Route to Any available staff ✕
    When Outside operating hours and customer wants urgent reply → Route to Owner via SMS ✕

    🎛️ Allowed actions

    What the AI can do on your behalf. Anything off is read-only.

    Book reservations
    Writes to the Booking Engine. Capacity enforced centrally.
    Recommend menu items
    Suggest dishes based on customer questions and tags.
    Quote prices
    Share live prices from the menu. Off → "please see the menu".
    Apply promotion codes
    Validate and apply codes mentioned in chat.
    Take delivery orders
    Requires Delivery CMS · currently not in plan 🔒
    Make timing promises (e.g. "ready in 20 min")
    Off by default — avoids guarantees the kitchen can't keep.

    Behavior · persona, messaging, escalation rules, and capability toggles · governs what every channel does

    Settings

    Operational config for your Concierge.

    🕐 Operating hours

    When the AI handles conversations. Outside these hours, behavior uses the "after-hours" rule below.

    Mon10:00 — 22:30Lunch + dinner
    Tue10:00 — 22:30Lunch + dinner
    Wed10:00 — 22:30Lunch + dinner
    Thu10:00 — 22:30Lunch + dinner
    Fri10:00 — 23:30Extended
    Sat09:00 — 23:30Brunch + late
    Sun09:00 — 22:00Brunch + dinner

    🌐 Languages

    AI auto-detects per conversation. Primary is used when ambiguous.

    🇻🇳 Vietnamese (primary) 🇬🇧 English 🇰🇷 Korean + Add
    Translate to Vietnamese for staff
    Customer-facing message stays in original language.

    🙋 Human handoff routing

    📱 Mobile push ✉️ Email 💬 Hub inbox

    🔐 Data, privacy, retention

    Allow customers to request a transcript
    Self-serve transcript download via end-of-chat link.

    ⚡ Quota & overage

    Your subscription includes a monthly AI quota; anything over bills as PAYG.

    Included this month5,000 conversations
    Used so far3,109 (62%)
    Forecast at month end~4,830
    PAYG rate₫1,200 per extra conv

    62% used · ~12 days left in cycle

    Settings · operational config · quota & overage panel surfaces hybrid pricing transparently to the merchant

    Settings
    Thursday, 12 May · Good morning Chien

    You had a strong night. Today looks busy.

    Yesterday closed 12% above your weekly average. Today's bookings are tracking 18% ahead — and AI Management has 1 action that would matter this week.

    A−
    Operations score
    Top 28% of Saigon coffee & brunch spots
    👥
    Covers · yesterday
    142/ 156 target
    ▲ 12%vs same day last week
    🧾
    Avg ticket
    ₫214k
    ▲ 4%peer median ₫186k
    🌐
    Online mix
    42%
    ▲ 3pponline vs walk-in
    🔁
    Repeat rate
    31%
    ▼ 9pp7-day rolling
    💡
    Next best action · this week

    Feature the morning combo on your Dine-in landing

    Similar restaurants in your area saw average ticket rise +18% within 2 weeks after surfacing a morning combo. Your morning ticket is currently 9% below the peer median — your weakest hour, and the easiest to lift.

    🎯 Estimated impact · +₫1.8M / month

    ⚠️ Heads-up today

    ⏱️ Wait time

    Weekend wait times jumped to 22 min

    Up from 9 min last week. Could explain the −9pp drop in repeat customers.

    Likely cause: Sat 7–9 PM overbooked by 12 covers vs floor capacity. Consider tightening slot caps.
    📈 Trending

    "Truffle pasta" mentions up 3× this week

    Most-asked menu item in AI Concierge convos. Stock check recommended.

    📱 What the owner sees on their phone

    9:14 📶 🔋

    Today · "the next best action this week, not raw metrics" · default landing for operator-tier merchants · mobile-first by design

    Recommendations

    Surfaced by the rule engine, weighted by estimated impact. Accept · dismiss · snooze each card.

    All 💰 Revenue 🔁 Retention ⚡ Operations 🍽️ Menu
    🥐
    Revenue · Top priority this week

    Feature the morning combo on Dine-in landing

    Similar restaurants in your area saw average ticket rise +18% within 2 weeks after surfacing a morning combo. Your morning ticket is currently 9% below the peer median.

    +₫1.8M / moEst. impact
    2 weeksTime to effect
    High confidence43 peer signals
    ⏱️
    Operations

    Tighten weekend booking slots — your floor can't keep up

    Sat 7–9 PM slots are oversold by 12 covers vs your floor capacity. This is likely why repeat rate is down 9pp. Reduce slot caps to 4 parties/slot for that window.

    +5pp repeat rateEst. recovery
    This weekendTime to effect
    Anomaly-linkedActs on heads-up
    🍽️
    Menu

    Add a vegetarian main — 24% of AI Concierge requests can't find one

    Out of 612 dietary questions this month, 147 asked about full vegetarian mains and the AI redirected to side dishes. Peers with 1+ veg main convert these into bookings 31% of the time.

    ~38 bookings / moCaptured demand
    4 weeksTime to effect
    From AI ConciergeSignal source
    📲
    Retention

    Send a "we miss you" promotion to 142 lapsed customers

    142 customers who used to come 2× / month haven't visited in 60+ days. A targeted 15% off promotion code recovers ~22% of lapsed diners in peer data.

    ~31 bookingsRecoverable
    2 weeksTime to effect
    Unified CDPAudience source
    📸
    Menu · Dismissed 2 days ago

    Add photos to 8 menu items missing imagery

    Items with photos book 2.3× more often via AI Concierge. 8 items in your menu have no photo.

    Recommendations · weighted by estimated impact · each grounded in peer data via Aggregated Data Intelligence · acceptance feeds back into the rule engine

    Anomalies

    Drops or spikes worth knowing about. We flag the cause when we can identify it.

    Open · 3 Resolved · 14 All
    📉 High priority Detected 2 hours ago

    Repeat customer rate dropped 9 points this week

    From 40% (4-week avg) to 31% over the last 7 days. This is your biggest negative swing since we started tracking.

    Likely cause: weekend wait times spiked to 22 min (was 9 min) after the new Sat 7 PM slot configuration. Peers with similar wait jumps see repeat rate fall 7–12pp.
    ⏱️ Operational Yesterday

    Avg kitchen fire→ready time crept up 24%

    From 3m 22s to 4m 12s over 5 days. Not critical yet but trending wrong.

    Likely cause: new menu item "truffle pasta" takes 6m 40s avg — pulling the overall average up. Acceptable if you intended it; consider a longer prep flag.
    📈 Positive · investigate 3 days ago

    AI Concierge booking conversion up 6pp

    From 21% to 27% conversation→booking rate this week. Whatever's working, double down.

    Likely cause: greeting message update on Mon ("date night" framing) correlates with the lift. Consider applying similar tone to other channels.

    Anomalies · flagged with timeframe, magnitude, likely cause · push alerts for High priority · trains the rule engine over time

    Benchmarks

    How you compare to similar restaurants nearby — powered by Aggregated Data Intelligence.

    📊 Your peer group · 47 restaurants

    Cuisine: Vietnamese + brunch / coffee · Area: District 1, Saigon · Size: 20–60 covers · Price band: ₫₫
    🧾 Average ticket You rank P72
    YOU
    P10 · ₫120k Median · ₫186k P90 · ₫260k

    You're ₫214k — comfortably above median. Top quartile is within reach with a small dinner price lift.

    👥 Daily covers You rank P58
    YOU
    P10 · 42 Median · 124 P90 · 220

    142 covers/day · slightly above median. Volume headroom available — likely throttled by weekend wait times.

    🔁 Repeat customer rate You rank P22
    YOU
    P10 · 18% Median · 38% P90 · 56%

    31% — below peer median. Biggest opportunity. See the linked recommendation in Recommendations.

    🌐 Online channel mix You rank P64
    YOU
    P10 · 18% Median · 35% P90 · 62%

    42% of orders/bookings come through online surfaces — slightly above median, growing.

    ⏱️ Avg booking wait time You rank P15
    YOU
    P10 · 6 min Median · 11 min P90 · 25 min

    22 min wait — bottom of the pack. Direct driver of the repeat-rate drop.

    Benchmarks · same metrics, relative to your peer group · "where am I in the pack?" instead of "what's my number?" · peer group is adjustable

    Settings

    Alert thresholds, notification channels, peer group preferences.

    🚨 Alert thresholds

    An alert fires when a metric moves more than this much vs the 4-week baseline.

    📣 Notification channels

    Where alerts and daily summaries go. Push is recommended for the mobile-first experience.

    📱 Mobile push
    High priority anomalies in real time. Daily 8 AM summary.
    📧 Email
    Weekly performance summary every Monday.
    💬 SMS
    High priority anomalies only — falls back to SMS when push unavailable.
    🤫 Quiet hours
    No notifications between 11 PM and 7 AM.

    📊 Peer group preferences

    Who you're compared to in Benchmarks. Default: auto-detected from your menu, location, and price band.

    Current peer group: 47 restaurants. Below 20 peers, comparisons are hidden to protect anonymity.

    🧠 Recommendations preferences

    Show "Estimated impact" on cards
    Predicted revenue/retention impact based on peer outcomes.
    Auto-apply low-risk recommendations
    e.g. "add photo to menu item X" applies on accept without confirmation.
    Include cross-service recommendations
    Suggestions that span multiple services (e.g. menu → Concierge → Dine-in).

    Settings · thresholds and notification routing tuned to the operator's rhythm · peer group adjustable but defaults are smart

    🎭 Role templates

    Pre-defined role packages. Clone any to customize per-service grants.

    OwnerAll services · full access · billingDefault
    ManagerAll services minus billing · read CDPDefault
    HostTables · Waitlist · read-only CDPDefault
    CashierDine-in billing · POSDefault
    KitchenDine-in live orders onlyDefault

    🔐 Security

    Require 2FA for all staff
    Email or authenticator app on every sign-in.
    Single sign-on (SSO)
    Requires Enterprise tier · Google · Microsoft · SAML
    Auto-lock idle sessions after 30 min
    Recommended for shared kitchen tablets.

    Developer

    API keys, webhooks, and MCP endpoint for power users + AI agents.

    🔑 API keys

    Use to read or write Hub data programmatically. Keep these secret.

    Production sk_live_••••••••••••a8f2 ● Active
    Test / sandbox sk_test_••••••••••••b91c Sandbox

    🪝 Webhooks

    POSTed when subscribed events fire. Retried with backoff.

    https://ops.saigoncoffee.vn/hooks/bookings booking.created · booking.cancelled ● 200 OK
    https://ops.saigoncoffee.vn/hooks/orders order.completed · order.refunded 5xx · retrying

    🤖 MCP endpoint

    Let AI agents (Claude, Cursor, etc.) read/write your Hub via the Model Context Protocol.

    https://hub.savyu.com/mcp/saigoncoffee
    MCP enabled
    Off blocks all agent traffic.
    Allow write actions
    When off, MCP is read-only. Recommended unless you know the agent.

    Developer · API keys · webhooks · MCP endpoint for AI agents

    Data & privacy

    Exports, retention, deletion, audit log.

    📤 Export your data

    Generate a full export of your account data — CSV + JSON.

    Customers (CDP)
    2,184 records
    Bookings & orders
    All time
    Menu & settings
    AI Concierge transcripts
    Up to retention period

    🗑 Retention

    ⚠️ Customer data deletion request

    Honor a customer's right-to-be-forgotten request. Removes from CDP, anonymizes in orders / bookings / transcripts.

    Deletion completes within 30 days. You'll get a confirmation email when finalized.

    📜 Audit log

    Every write action by your team — actor, action, target, time.

    Items · main dishes · each linked to one or more add-on groups · per-channel pricing in the item editor · changes propagate to all services in < 3 min

    Add-on groups

    Reusable option sets. One group can be linked to many items — change the price once, propagates everywhere.

    🥛
    Milk choice
    Drink customization · most-used group
    Required. Pick exactly 1. 14 items linked.
    Whole milk included Oat milk +₫15k Almond milk +₫15k Soy milk +₫10k Condensed milk included No milk −₫0
    Linked items Cà phê sữa đá Cà phê đen đá Latte Cappuccino Hot chocolate + 9 more
    🍝
    Pasta size
    Portion option · pasta & risotto
    Required. Pick exactly 1. 4 items linked.
    Regular included Large +₫45k Half portion −₫40k
    Linked items Truffle pasta Mushroom risotto Carbonara Aglio e olio
    🌶
    Spice level
    Customer preference
    Optional. Pick 0–1. 22 items linked.
    Mild included Medium included Hot included Extra hot 🔥🔥🔥 included
    Linked items Phở bò tái Bánh mì pâté gà Bún chả + 19 more
    🧀
    Extra toppings
    Multi-select add-ons
    Optional. Pick up to 4. 8 items linked.
    Extra cheese +₫35k Truffle shavings +₫85k Soft egg yolk +₫25k Avocado +₫45k Sautéed mushroom +₫35k Crispy garlic +₫15k
    Linked items Truffle pasta Mushroom risotto Aglio e olio + 5 more
    🥩
    Protein swap
    Substitute the main protein
    Optional. Pick 0–1. 12 items linked.
    Default as listed Chicken included Beef +₫35k Tofu (vegan) −₫20k Shrimp +₫45k
    Linked items Bánh mì pâté gà Gỏi cuốn Bún chả + 9 more
    🍯
    Sweetness level
    Drink customization
    Optional. Pick exactly 1. 11 items linked.
    No sugar 25% 50% 75% (standard) 100%
    Linked items Cà phê sữa đá Trà sữa + 9 more

    Add-on groups · reusable across items · change a group once → every linked item updates · supports required/optional, min/max picks, default options, price modifiers per option

    🍛 咖喱料理 Curry
    2 items
    ● Visible
    ⋯
    ⋮⋮
    🥤 Drinks (cha chaan teng classics)
    7 items
    ● Visible
    ⋯
    ⋮⋮
    🎉 Seasonal specials
    6 items
    ○ Hidden
    ⋯

    Categories · drag-to-reorder · supports 1 level of subcategories · per-category visibility toggle (hide seasonal items off-season)

    Availability

    Time-of-day menus + out-of-stock toggles. Out-of-stock is also one tap from the live order screens.

    📆 Menu schedules

    Which categories show when. The AI Concierge, Website, and Dine-in QR all respect these windows.

    Breakfast setsDaily · 08:00–11:00 · Bun & noodle sets · milk tea / yuenyeung● On
    All-day menuDaily · 11:00–22:00 · Full menu — signatures, noodles, HK flavour, sizzling, curry● On
    Tea-time snacksDaily · 14:30–17:30 · Crispy buns, kaya, hot drinks (50% off select buns)● On
    Late-night supperFri–Sat · 22:00–02:00 · Noodles, congee, hot drinks only● On
    Lunch combo (set meals)Mon–Fri · 11:00–14:30 · Sizzling / noodle / curry sets with soup & drink● On

    🚫 Out of stock today · 5 items

    Quick disable. Auto-resets at midnight unless extended.

    Baked Pork Chop Rice (鮮茄焗豬扒飯)Tomato sauce supplier delay · ETA tomorrow AMOut
    Sweet & Sour Prawns (山楂鳳梨海蝦球)86'd at lunch · prawn supply shortOut
    Morel Mushroom Chicken SoupSold out · refill arriving 16:00Out
    Crispy Bun w/ Condensed Milk (脆嘩奶油豬)Low — 6 portions leftLow
    Lamb Chop Curry (咖喱羊扒)Low — 3 portions leftLow

    📍 Per-location availability

    Le Loi is your only location. With Operator+ multi-location, you can mark items available at some locations and not others.

    Le Loi (Primary)71 of 76 items available right now● Open

    Availability · time-of-day menus · out-of-stock toggles · per-location (with Operator+) · all enforced centrally so every ordering channel offers the same picture

    Import & export

    Bulk update your menu via spreadsheet, convert a PDF menu with AI, or export everything.

    📂

    Import from Excel

    Bulk-edit your menu in Excel/Numbers and upload. Items match by ID; new rows become new items; missing rows are flagged (not deleted).

    📂 Drop .xlsx here or click to browse · up to 10MB
    📥 Download template · 3 columns minimum (name, category, price)
    ✨

    Convert from PDF (AI)

    Upload your existing PDF menu — AI parses items, prices, and categories. Review the suggestions, then import in one click.

    📄 Drop PDF here AI extracts items + prices · scanned PDFs OK
    ⚡ Most menus parse in < 60 seconds · 95% accuracy on prices
    📤

    Export menu

    Download your full menu — items, categories, add-on groups, allergens, photos URL. Useful for backups, audits, or sharing with a designer.

    Includes 76 items · 14 add-on groups · 11 categories

    Action
    Result
    By

    Import / Export · Excel for bulk edits · PDF→AI for new menu onboarding · always exportable · all imports kept in history with rollback

    Menu settings

    Currency, taxes, allergen taxonomy, photo defaults.

    💵 Currency & tax

    ⚠️ Allergen taxonomy

    Which allergen tags appear in the item editor. Affects what AI Concierge can flag. Click any tag to edit or remove.

    Vegan Vegetarian Gluten-free Dairy Nuts Spicy Pork Shellfish Egg Halal-friendly

    📸 Photos

    Show photos on customer surfaces
    Items with photos book 2.3× more often.
    Auto-optimize image sizes
    WebP + responsive sizes for delivery to mobile.
    Use AI to suggest photo crops
    Focuses on the food for thumbnails.

    🔁 Sync & propagation

    Where this menu is read by other services.

    AI ConciergeReads · last sync 3 min ago● Live
    Website BuilderReads · embeds on /menu● Live
    Dine-in CMSReads · QR landing● Live
    Delivery CMSReads · delivery menu (per-channel pricing)🔒 Locked
    Table MgmtReads · for floor staff reference● Live

    Settings · currency & tax · allergen taxonomy · photo defaults · sync status across services (Content Engine fan-out)

    Marketing consents

    Per-channel opt-in/out across your customer base · enforced when sending promos.

    ✉️
    Email opt-in
    1,684/ 2,184
    77% rate
    💬
    SMS opt-in
    1,328/ 2,184
    61% rate
    📲
    Zalo opt-in
    1,142/ 2,184
    52% rate
    🚫
    Unsubscribed all
    62
    2.8% global opt-out

    📋 Compliance defaults

    Require explicit opt-in for marketing
    GDPR-style — recommended for EU customers + reputation.
    Include unsubscribe footer in all marketing emails
    Standard legal requirement.
    Honor SMS STOP/UNSUBSCRIBE keywords
    Auto-flag the contact as opted out across channels.
    Re-confirm opt-in after 24 months of inactivity
    Best practice for old lists — sends one re-permission ask.

    Consents · per-channel opt-in tracked at the customer record · Promotion Code respects this automatically when targeting a segment

    Customer settings

    PII retention & profile merge rules for the CDP.

    🗑 PII retention

    🧩 Profile merge rules

    When the same person shows up via different channels, how aggressively do we merge?

    Auto-merge on matching phone
    Auto-merge on matching email
    Auto-merge on probable name + booking pattern
    Lower confidence — staff can review queue.
    Notify staff when merge is uncertain

    Settings · retention & merge · the CDP unification logic that keeps "one diner = one profile" across services

    Staff settings

    Onboarding, time-off requests, password policy.

    🚀 Onboarding

    Auto-send welcome guide on invite accept
    PDF + video tour of the Hub.
    Require initial training quiz
    5-question quiz · auto-graded · gates first shift.
    Assign a buddy on first day
    Pair the new hire with an existing staff member.

    📅 Time-off requests

    Staff can submit requests in-app

    🔐 Password & access policy

    Settings · onboarding · time-off policy · password rules · complements the Security panel in Hub Settings

    Promotion settings

    Code generation defaults · stacking · auto-create.

    🎲 Code generation

    🔁 Stacking rules

    Allow stacking VIP discounts with code discounts
    VIPs get their 10% + the campaign discount.
    One code per order
    Recommended — keeps math simple at checkout.
    Codes apply to service charge & tip
    Off = discount applied to item subtotal only.

    🤖 Auto-create suggestions

    AI Management suggests new codes
    e.g. "launch a Sunday brunch code — your Sundays are 18% below capacity"
    Auto-pause underperforming codes
    If a code has < 1% redemption rate after 7 days, pause & notify.
    Respect marketing consents automatically
    Won't include opted-out customers in any audience. Always on.

    Settings · code generation · stacking rules · auto-suggestions from AI Management

    🔍 Esc
    ↑↓ navigate ⏎ select esc close Powered by ⌘K
